title: Add Sprint to to Jira Integration
excerpt: Please add the Jira Sprint field in the list of fields that can be mapped through the Jira integration recipes.

posts.author: Georgios (Eleftheriadis)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add the Jira Sprint field in the list of fields that can be mapped through the Jira integration recipes.

posts.author: KarenA (Karen Aiken)
posts.cookedHtml: Added my vote - I can copy Sprint Name into a Monday Status field, but can’t see a way to reflect any updates to that field in Monday back to Jira. I tried a couple different field types in Monday (Dropdown, Text), with no luck.

posts.author: YuleyEldar (Yuley Eldar)
posts.cookedHtml:
This was added in the new Jira-Monday integration.
works very well

posts.author: Georgios (Eleftheriadis)
posts.cookedHtml: Does it work for Jira Server integration?

posts.author: KarenA (Karen Aiken)
posts.cookedHtml:
It works well from Jira to Monday - there doesn’t seem to be the capability to sync changes in Monday back to Jira.

When setting up the field mappings Jira TO Monday, I can map the Sprint Name to a Monday column.

When setting up field mappings Monday TO Jira, I can’t pull up any useful Jira fields to update.
